name: Physics Research
description: Cutting-edge research in physics spanning condensed matter, particle physics, and quantum systems

papers.title: Observation of Topological Edge States in Superconducting Circuits
papers.abstract: We experimentally observe protected edge modes in a superconducting qubit array with engineered topology. These results validate topological protection mechanisms and open new avenues for robust quantum information processing.

papers.title: Quantum Entanglement Distribution via Continuous Variable Systems
papers.abstract: We demonstrate long-distance entanglement distribution using squeezed light and homodyne detection. The protocol achieves robust entanglement swapping over 50 km of optical fiber.

papers.title: Non-Hermitian Dynamics in Dissipative Photonic Systems
papers.abstract: This work explores exceptional point physics in coupled photonic resonators with controlled gain and loss. We reveal novel lasing mechanisms and demonstrate parity-time symmetric behavior.
